title: Where Your £79,000 Goes
subtitle: Every pound deployed on Day 1 of reopening — no funds held in reserve outside the business
bannerNote: VAT on startup costs (~£7,333) reclaimed in Q1 — credited against first HMRC VAT return (August 2026)

rent.label: Rent Deposit (3 months)
rent.desc: Security deposit held by landlord covering May, Jun, Jul 2026.

hardware.label: Hardware from Liquidators
hardware.desc: Physical bar & kitchen equipment (£20,000 + VAT) — purchased at liquidation pricing. Operational on Day 1.

ip.label: IP License Fee
ip.desc: Brand + gaming IP licence — was a £72,000 inc VAT Plonk IP & Goodwill purchase under the old deal.

stock.label: Stock & Supplier Restart
stock.desc: Opening stock, supplier agreements and software subscriptions to trade from Day 1.

working.label: Working Capital Buffer
working.desc: Staged into business per cash flow model. Covers early trading before revenue covers costs.
